theme: Minimum-XOR circuits for GF(2) linear maps
title: Cancel-and-Share: Minimum-XOR Straight-Line Programs for GF(2) Linear Maps
strategies: trivial: independent per-row XOR-fold (= checker baseline)
strong: build the all-ones sum S once, realise dense rows as S ^ (missing-bit fold) via intermediate cancellation
innovation_hook: Allowing intermediate cancellation, not just monotone subexpression reuse, unlocks shorter linear circuits than any greedy shared-sum heuristic finds.
